queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the risk-mitigating impact of lacking a checking account on credit default probability.
Determinants of default: empirical analysis of how education loan purposes contribute to elevated credit risk profiles.

queries.feature_definition: Credit history: critical account or other existing credits.
queries.question: Credit risk drivers: empirical analysis of the default probability reduction associated with critical or other existing credit history status.
